mainEntity.name: How much does a 276DT (2.7 TDV6) engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned 276DT TDV6 typically costs £5,000–£7,500 supply only, varying by spec and rebuild quality. A used unit can be found from £2,800–£4,500, but history is critical. Fitting adds £900–£2,000 depending on labour rates.

mainEntity.name: Is the 276DT (2.7 TDV6) a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is a refined and capable V6 (3.5★) — but its reputation is compromised by the well-documented oil pump housing failure. This single point of weakness can cause sudden oil pressure loss and catastrophic bottom-end failure.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common 276DT failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Oil pump housing failure is the most serious — a weak point at the tensioner mount causes the pump to fail suddenly, killing oil pressure and destroying bearings. Cold start knock is the early warning sign. Other issues include turbo failure and EGR clogging.

mainEntity.name: Which Land Rover models use the 276DT?

acceptedAnswer.text: The 276DT powered the Discovery 3 (L319) from 2004–2009 and the Range Rover Sport (L320) from 2005–2010.

mainEntity.name: Is the Land Rover 276DT the same as Jaguar's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the 276DT is shared with Jaguar fitments in the XF (X250) and XJ (X351). The engine is mechanically identical, though ECU calibrations and ancillaries differ by model.

hero.tagPill: Land Rover • 276DT (2.7 TDV6) • Diesel • 2.7L V6 Turbo • 2004–2010
hero.h1: Land Rover 276DT (2.7 TDV6) Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The 276DT is Land Rover's first modern V6 diesel — smooth and torquey, but its oil pump is a single-point failure risk. Backed by 700+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [EM-VERIFIED].

verdictRating.confidence: 85% confidence — based on 700+ real UK enquiries, specialist rebuild reports, and owner‑forum data spanning 20 years of real-world use.

rows.score: 8 (Midpoint of Reconditioned (Supply Only) range: £5,000–£7,500 → £6,250 midpoint → falls in £5,000–£6,999 bracket → 8)
8 (V6 layout and specialist requirements add cost; oil pump failure often kills the engine completely)
12 (276DT parts available but less common than 306DT; some components shared with Ford/Jaguar)
14 (Reconditioned cost (£6,250 midpoint) as % of lowest typical vehicle value (Discovery 3 ~£4,000–£7,000) = 89–156% — falls in 30–44% bracket → 14)

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The 276DT is a refined early V6 diesel — but its oil pump housing is the Achilles' heel — buy only with documented oil pump history or factor in replacement cost.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers the Jaguar XF (X250) and XJ (X351) → [Jaguar 276DT page].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting a 276DT typically takes 14–18 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [EM-QUOTE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across Land Rover and Jaguar applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access and subframe design.
